rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is to separate loyalty to different targets (chain vs. outlet), and the cited paper’s core contribution is an analogous separation (selling firm vs. salesperson-owned loyalty). Given this strong construct-level overlap and even parallel framing (“Loyalty to Whom?”), the cited work is plausibly a conceptual/theory source rather than an incidental mention, despite limited raw citation-context evidence (DOI match only).
